inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Overhead percentage applied to direct costs (e.g., utilities, admin).

businessContext_i18n.en: Overhead percentage applied to direct costs (e.g., utilities, admin).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan maliyetlere uygulanan genel gider yüzdesi (örneğin elektrik, idari).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemeinkostenprozentsatz auf direkte Kosten (z. B. Betriebskosten, Verwaltung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de frais généraux appliqué aux coûts directs (ex. : services publics, administration).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de gastos generales aplicado a los costos directos (ej. servicios públicos, administración).
